title: paul russells 30W Outdoor Motion Sensor Light, LED Security Floodlight with PIR Sensor, 3600LM Daylight 6500K, IP65 Waterproof, Mains Powered Outdoor Lights for Garden, Garage, Front Door
features: 𝐏𝐎𝐖𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐔𝐋 𝐋𝐄𝐃 𝐒𝐄𝐂𝐔𝐑𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆: These LED Security Floodlight provides good visibility for outdoor security lighting around driveways, gardens, and front doors by providing up to 3600 lumens of bright 6500K daylight with a wide 120° beam.

𝐏𝐈𝐑 𝐌𝐎𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐒𝐄𝐍𝐒𝐎𝐑 𝐃𝐄𝐓𝐄𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: When movement is detected, the built-in PIR sensors with 12 m range and up to 120° detection instantly turn on the outdoor motion sensor light, which also makes it perfect for a security camera to detect any object.

𝐄𝐍𝐄𝐑𝐆𝐘 𝐄𝐅𝐅𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄: Traditional outdoor incandescent floodlights can be replaced with our 30W LED floodlights, which use over 85% less energy and cut electricity costs without compromising brightness.

𝐖𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐎𝐅 & 𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: The IP65 waterproof rating with die-cast aluminium housing and frosted glass of this led floodlight ensures reliable outdoor use as garden lights mains powered, even in rain, dust, or changing weather.

𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐌𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 𝐏𝐎𝐖𝐄𝐑𝐄𝐃 𝐈𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐋𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: It is compatible with mains-powered outdoor sensor lights and outdoor wall lights with sensors as it has pre-soldered wiring and an adjustable bracket for flexible placement on walls or garages.
description: The Paul Russell 30W PIR Motion Sensor Light will enhance your outdoor security by illuminating gardens, driveways, garages, and entrances with durability and energy efficiency. With a 120° beam angle and up to 3600 lumens of bright daylight white 6500K light, this LED floodlight provides broad coverage to obtain better safety and visibility. The integrated PIR motion sensor automatically turns on the light when it senses movement up to 12 meters within a 120° range. You can adjust the detecting distance, illumination period (from 5 seconds to 9 minutes), and day or night operation by your preferences with its fully customizable settings. It is a mains-powered outdoor security light that uses less energy than classic floodlights by more than 85% without sacrificing brightness. The IP65 waterproof rating, frosted glass panel, and sturdy die-cast aluminum body guarantee reliable functionality in all weather. This outdoor sensor light is a dependable option for long-lasting security lighting and is simple to install with pre-wired cables and an adjustable mounting bracket. 𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬: 30W LED Produces 3600 Lumens Bright Light Daylight White 6500K for Clear Visibility Wide 120° Beam Angle for Large Area Coverage PIR Motion Sensor with 12m Detection Range 120° Motion Detection for Improved Security Adjustable Time, Distance, and Day/Night Mode Save Over 85% Energy vs Traditional Floodlights IP65 Waterproof for All-Weather Outdoor Use Durable Aluminium Body with Frosted Glass Easy Mains Installation with Adjustable Bracket

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Easy Installation, Flicker Free, IK05 Durability, IP65 Protection, Up To 85% Energy Savings
